_comment: Drop JSON files here to extend the loadout registry. All files are merged at server startup.
_schema: Extension files may add to any top-level array: frameworks, providers, init_scripts, presets.

frameworks.name: my-custom-framework
frameworks.label: My Custom Framework
frameworks.description: An operator-defined AIWG framework installed via aiwg use my-custom-framework

presets.name: my-preset
presets.label: My Preset
presets.description: Operator-defined preset combining custom frameworks and providers
